payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a raised rectangular center panel and subtle wood grain; glossy finish with minor scuffs near the lower edge and the crop is edge‑cut/partial — approximately 0.7 m from the camera.
